ptxt.intxrefpoff: Clutch Release System Removal and Installation

servinfosub.title: Clutch Release Bearing
servinfosub.ptxt: Check clutch release bearing (1) for smooth rotation. If abnormality is found, replace clutch release bearing.

attention2.ptxt: Do not wash clutch release bearing. Doing so may wash off grease packed in bearing, resulting in seizure of bearing.

servinfosub.title: Clutch Release Shaft
servinfosub.ptxt: Check clutch release shaft and its pin for deflection or damage.
If abnormality is found, replace clutch release shaft.
